brief_summary: Two-bar chart showing Masterpiece R2's consecutive thock tracker score gains: W25 at 38 (direction up, lighter coral bar) and W26 at 46 (direction up, fuller coral bar). A dashed arrow connects the bars to show directional movement. A callout box right of the W26 bar labels it 'closing week — buy closes June 26, 2026.' Y-axis runs 0–60 in increments of 10.
data_sources: gmk-cyl-masterpiece-r2-group-buy.mdx § lede — 'scoring 46 in W26 with the buy open through June 26'
gmk-cyl-masterpiece-r2-group-buy.mdx § 'Tracker outlook' — 'Masterpiece R2 has been posting consecutive direction=up scores on the thock tracker — 38 in W25, 46 in W26.'
gmk-cyl-masterpiece-r2-group-buy.mdx § 'Tracker outlook' — 'The W26 score represents the closing-week demand peak that most well-seeded GMK group buys reach as the window compresses.'
